name: 0.c0011
description: Transparent Tribe baseline campaign for the canonical reviewer smoke path.
objective: Exercise the end-to-end STICKS execution and evidence pipeline with one adapted Linux path and several explicitly inspired Windows-compatible steps.

techniques.name: Digital Certificates
techniques.description: Generate a local certificate artifact for controlled infrastructure staging.

techniques.name: Acquire Infrastructure: Domains
techniques.description: Create a local domain-registration artifact for infrastructure preparation.

techniques.name: Stage Capabilities: Upload Malware
techniques.description: Stage a benign payload artifact for subsequent steps.

techniques.name: Phishing: Spearphishing Link
techniques.description: Create a local phishing-link artifact for the user-execution branch.

techniques.name: Phishing: Spearphishing Attachment
techniques.description: Create a local spearphishing email and attachment artifact.

techniques.name: User Execution: Malicious Link
techniques.description: Log a controlled user-link access event.

techniques.name: User Execution: Malicious File
techniques.description: Log a controlled malicious-file execution event.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Visual Basic
techniques.description: Simulate Visual Basic execution semantics on the Linux substrate.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell
techniques.description: Simulate PowerShell execution semantics on the Linux substrate.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: JavaScript
techniques.description: Simulate Windows Script Host JavaScript execution semantics on the Linux substrate.

techniques.name: Hijack Execution Flow
techniques.description: Simulate an execution-flow hijack artifact for persistence and privilege-escalation reasoning.
